message:
fix(sources): Preserve path separator in directory path mappings

Fix bug where path mappings like "/a/" -> "/b" would incorrectly map
"/a/file" to "/bfile" instead of "/b/file".

When the 'from' pattern ends with a separator but 'to' does not, and
the remaining path doesn't start with a separator, we now properly
insert the separator between 'to' and the rest of the path.

This ensures path mappings behave correctly for directory-to-directory
transforms where the destination omits the trailing separator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
